query:
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.membershipStatus, c.id as customer_id, c.name as customer_name 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON LOWER(u.name) = LOWER(c.name) 
LIMIT 10;
command:
